parameters.apprise_url_plus: evolutions://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.instance_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Evolution API destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise evolutions:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Evolution API apikey

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Evolution API host

instance_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Evolution API instance

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Evolution API targets
